TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pedro Pablo Kuczynski ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 10, Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1938) mrhuw Peru ta' misuw hya' ga Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: pe*ro paő≤lo ku ¶~ ®zjns~…ēki rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, pe*ro paő≤lo ku ¶~ ®zjns~…ēki, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw peru ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pe*ro paő≤lo ku ¶~ ®zjns~…ēki, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Pedro Pablo Kuczynski ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 10, Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1938) mrhuw Peru ta' misuw hya' ga Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw peru ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pe*ro paő≤lo ku ¶~ ®zjns~…ēki, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
